conflicts.reason: Both add bonus merchants, but cdtweaks #1170 has REQUIRE_PREDICATE GAME_IS soa/tob/bgt — it CANNOT install on EE/EET. This conflict is impossible on EET installs. On non-EE installs, choose one.
conflicts.source: cdtweaks tp2 #1170 has REQUIRE_PREDICATE GAME_IS ~soa tob bgt~; cannot install on bgee/bg2ee/eet, 2026-03

sum: BG2 quest mod about breaking free from captivity. Adds a storyline with new areas and freedom-themed encounters.
